failedAssertions.reason: Canvas overlay click handler not responding to click events in mock detection mode - bounding boxes render but clicks don't trigger the detail modal

frictions.description: Canvas overlay bounding box click handler not responding to mouse/touch events in mock detection mode. Attempted JavaScript canvas events and mouse commands at various positions where bounding boxes are rendered.
frictions.note: VAL-CROSS-007 passed because dashboard entry works; camera overlay entry has this friction

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-DM-006, VAL-OVERLAY-014, VAL-CROSS-007 to 'passed' with mock detection mode notes

summary: User testing round 2 for dashboard milestone: 3/4 camera-specific assertions passed with mock detection mode. VAL-DM-006 (camera continues with modal), VAL-OVERLAY-014 (threshold slider filtering), and VAL-CROSS-007 (dashboard-to-modal consistency) all verified successfully. VAL-OVERLAY-010 remains failed due to canvas overlay click handler not responding - bounding boxes render but click events don't trigger the modal. This is a UI interaction issue separate from the MediaPipe loading problem that was solved by mock mode.
